calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-15-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Petitioner: Yu Zhen Jian, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jia Xin Xu, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Willaim Guan.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No appearance by Co-Petitioner/Minor's Father: Tak Hung Tsui, but signed the Petition consenting to the the Name Change of the Minor.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Sammi Ka Yan Tsui.
Decree signed in open court.
